name: Mohishashur Mordini
overview: In the mystical realm of gods and demons, Mahamaya, the divine feminine, emerges to restore balance, confronting ancient evils with her many forms and boundless power. From showcasing Sati's sacrifice to Shiv’s fury, this series celebrates the Aadishakti's power, showing that without her, life ceases to exist.

trailers.title: Trailer (আবির্ভাব) - Mohishashur Mordini (মহিষাসুরমর্দ্দিনী) | 2 OCT | Mahalaya On hoichoi
